entry.title: v0.17.0 – The Echoing Spire
entry.summary: SpiritVale v0.17.0 – The Echoing Spire. Full patch notes pending.

entry.title: v0.16.7 – Update 0.16.7
entry.summary: v0.16.7 – Update 0.16.7: 2 changed, 3 fixed, 1 removed. Vending Search: double-clicking an item now lets you buy it directly. Damage numbers now optimised (major source of lag reduced). Sell shops removed from maps.

entry.title: v0.16.3 – Update 0.16.3
entry.summary: v0.16.3 – Update 0.16.3: 2 added, 2 fixed. Added 2 SEA servers (more EU / NA / SEA servers coming soon). Fixed Rage skill not working on Berserker. Vending list now auto-populates.

entry.title: v0.16.0 – Rebalance Patch
entry.summary: v0.16.0 – Rebalance Patch: 2 added, 8 changed. Introduces Threat System and Spawner Boss KS protection. All class damage and sustain rebalanced; status effects revamped; armor sets overhauled. Monster damage reduced ~25%, boss regen removed.

entry.title: v0.15.0 – PVP Systems and Status Immunities
entry.summary: v0.15.0 – PVP Systems and Status Immunities: 5 added, 12 changed, 2 fixed. Adds PVP Skirmish Mode, Arena 2v2/3v3, MMR leaderboard, autoattack hotkey (C), and Status Effect Immunity via Attributes. Extensive Gunslinger and balance changes.

entry.title: v0.14.0 – Cosmetics Update
entry.summary: v0.14.0 – Cosmetics Update: 11 added, 5 changed, 2 fixed. Introduces Wardrobe and Cosmetics System, premium currency (p), dozens of gear/pet/mount cosmetics, Storage Expansion, Loot Filter, and character eye blinking animation.

entry.title: v0.13.5 – Update 0.13.5
entry.summary: v0.13.5 – Update 0.13.5: 10 changed, 3 fixed. Judgement Blade applies Slow; Divine Punishment applies Blind. Animation Delay now applied on cast. Minimum After Cast Delay 0.14s → 0.3s. Clones copy toggle buffs on spawn.

entry.title: v0.13.2 – Update 0.13.2
entry.summary: v0.13.2 – Update 0.13.2: 8 changed, 4 fixed. Crafting and Refine cooldown 0.7s → 0.1s. Execute Axe and Chaos Reaver damage reduced. Eclipse Kunai and Fuma Shuriken reworked. Fixed database issues and healing vs undead.
